writeup: The Buffalo Bills entered the first weekend of May 2026 riding the momentum of a busy NFL Draft week, with analysts and fans alike dissecting every pick from the April 24-26 selection weekend. Pro Football Focus and other outlets were deep in grading Buffalo's draft class, evaluating how well the front office addressed key positional needs. The Bills' undrafted free agent market was also active, as the team worked to supplement its draft haul with intriguing developmental talents. With rookie minicamp on the horizon, the focus was firmly on which newcomers could make an early impression and compete for roster spots. Buffalo's offseason trajectory was shaping up as one of the more closely watched in the AFC heading into the summer.

articles.title: 2026 NFL Draft: Buffalo Bills Draft Recap
